result.audience_framing: how does a brain actually work — framed around the BRAIN concept, NOT packages/monorepo/deps (cortex is the worked example)
result.hero: .mochaccino/designs/06-brain-anatomy/index.html — 'Anatomy of a Brain' (NEW). Ties the whole brain into one picture: (1) YOU FEED IT ingest mouth; (2) FOUR KINDS OF MEMORY as regions — Episodic/timeline · Semantic/knowledge-graph/entity-graph · Associative/vectors/recall-by-meaning · Housekeeping/sleep; (3) IT RECALLS BY MEANING lighting all four regions; (4) IT SLEEPS to consolidate; (5) SWAPPABLE ORGANS — Storage/Embedding/LLM seams you swap without touching the mind (the thesis none of the fragments showed). Links out to the 3 fragments as drill-downs.
